subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-06-11
subcodes.first_line: We have just returned from a visit to Philadelphia, spending two nights there and speaking
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transcending the material condition, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @man's distinction from the animal
